scenes.text:
You are going to suffer either way.
Choose the suffering that builds you.

The pain of discipline weighs ounces. The pain of regret weighs tons. You can either choose the temporary discomfort of doing the hard
thing now, or you can choose the permanent regret of never trying. Both hurt. Only one of them leads somewhere worth going.

Every time you skip the gym, eat the junk food, or hit snooze, you are choosing
the pain of regret over the pain of discipline. You are borrowing from your future self.

Suffer the pain of discipline or suffer
the pain of regret. You pick.

Which pain are you choosing today?
Comment below. Follow for hard truths.
